titleStmt.title: SII 38.361: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 361. (A.R. No. 361 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the west wall, first prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Kṛishṇadēvarāya Year: Śaka 1443, Vikrama, Kārttigai, Ekādasi, Monday = 9th July 1520 A.D.

summary.p: Records that Sadāsivanāyakkar appointed Arayavaṟai Pachchaiyaṉ, son of Narāyaṇaṉ Kōn, as supplier of oil (tiruviḷakkuḍi), for the merit of Lord (svāmi) Tirumalai-Nāyakkar, inorder to supply oil annually on the occasion of Kāṟtigai to the temple of Tirumalar-uḍaiyanāyaṉār at Dēvikkāppuram in Murugamaṅgalappaṟṟu in Mēlkuṉṟa-nāḍu in Palkuṉṟa-kōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam. The temple accountant Uttaṇḍi and also the temple trustee (tānam), Māyēśurar Mudaliyār figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cupamastu śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvara metiṉi micura kaṇḍakaṭṭāri cāḷuva śrīvira
pratāpa śrīkiṣṇaya devamahārāyar piṟutuvirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa
cakāṟtam 1000 4 100 4 10 3 mel cellā(āta) niṉṟa vigramavaruṣam kāttikai
Ekāteciyum comavārattu nāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu palkuṉṟakoṭ
ṭattu melkuṉṟanāṭu murukamaṅkalappaṟṟu tevakkāpuram tirumalar Uṭaiyanayiṉāṟku
tiruviḷakkukuṭi Āka śvāmi tirumalai nāyakkar taṉmamāka cātācivaRead catāciva nāyakkar viraṭapāṭakamur
nārāyaṇaṉ kon makaṉ Arayavaṟai paccaiyaṉ varuṣam Oṉṟukku tirukkāṟtikaikku cūla
kāli viḷakkuRead kālviḷakkuke yivan Inta ney patakku varuṣam varuṣantoṟum tirukoyilukku Aḷantu
cukattile yirukkavun Inta taṟumattukku Akutampaṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkaikaraiyile
kārāmpacuvai koṉṟa pāvattile pokakaṭavarākavum Ippaṭikku yinta kalveṭṭu Eḻutiṉa
maikku koyilkaṇakku Uttaṇṭi Eḻuttu Itānam māyecurar mutaliyār Eḻuttu §
dhi kku matu Aṭaippama mallaya nāyaincomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.361 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
